events.title: 52 Weeks of Firsts — Saturday First-ivals
events.description: Weekly free events honoring Philly firsts — Slinky, first Thanksgiving parade, the flag. New neighborhood each week.

events.title: What is the semiquincentennial?
events.description: The Semiquincentennial is the 250th anniversary of America’s Founders declaring the country’s independence right here in Philadelphia. events.description: Philadelphia is in no shortage of major events leading up to 2026. Football fanatics will get a taste of the World Cup in the summer of 2025 when Lincoln Financial Field hostsFIFA Club World Cup 2025™games. events.title: Celebrating 250 Years Philly Style!
events.description: Kicking off a full year of celebration, Philadelphia will spotlight its many historic “firsts” in 2026 through52 Weeks of Firsts— a citywide series of weekly events, storytelling, and experiences.  Some historic firsts include the Slinky, the nation’s first Thanksgiving Day Parade, and the American

events.title: Exciting Sporting Events
events.description: 2026 will also be a big year for sports in Philadelphia. The city has been chosen as one of the host cities for theFIFA World Cup 2026™, and will hold six matches at Lincoln Financial Field in the summer of 2026. events.title: New Philadelphia Museums and Exhibitions
events.description: In 2026, Philadelphia will debut landmark art experiences that celebrate American creativity and the city’s legacy of storytelling.
